Interim Guidelines for Collecting and Handling of Clinical Specimens for COVID-19 Testing 
Key points 
The type of specimen collected when testing for current or past infection with SARS-CoV-2 is based on the test being performed and its manufacturer's instructions. Some of the specimen types listed below will not be appropriate for all tests. 
Check with the testing laboratory’s test directory to ensure they can accept a specimen before collection.
